raw_inputs.deck_text: Ridgeline is a CI/CD observability layer for platform teams. We are at $38,000 MRR with 40% month-over-month growth for the last four months. We have 1,150 weekly active developers across 210 paying teams. I (Priya) was a founding engineer at Stripe for three years on the developer platform team before starting Ridgeline. Our co-founder Wes led infrastructure at Datadog for two years. We went through Techstars NYC in 2024. We were ranked #2 Product of the Day on Product Hunt in March 2025.
